creator: johntdarrah@gmail.com
text:
Hello:

I have noticed on several ports, the names of which escape me atm, there have been a request for volunteer maintainers. I would like to throw my name in the hat of whichever ports/pkgs need a maintainer. I have never worked in this manner, but I have the ability to learn and am definitely willing! :-)

Please let me know,
John Darrah
